c5fe412a831d83d0b3df95d6feaad390.description:
Create VLAN 351 on the target network device.

Requirements:
1. Create VLAN 351.
2. Configure the VLAN name as LOST_CODE_TEST
3. Verify that VLAN 350 exists after implementation.
4. Do not modify any existing VLANs.
5. Do not modify any interface configurations.

Expected Outcome:
VLAN 351 is successfully created with the name LOST_CODE_TEST and post-change verification confirms that the VLAN exists on the device.

397e54f1835d0f90b3df95d6feaad33a.short_description: Provision VLAN 230 and configure user access connectivity for Finance department
397e54f1835d0f90b3df95d6feaad33a.description:
Create VLAN 230 with the name Finance_Users and configure interface GigabitEthernet1/0/2 as an access port associated with VLAN 230 on the target network device.

After implementation, verify that:
- VLAN 230 exists on the device.
- GigabitEthernet1/0/2 is configured as an access port.
- GigabitEthernet1/0/2is assigned to VLAN 230.
- The configuration is successfully applied and visible in the running configuration.

This change supports onboarding of Finance department resources into the designated network segment and should follow standard change management procedures.
